narrative:
Tipp City Ex Vill Sd (Miami) exempted village school district has 11,727 registered voters, with 48.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.8 percentage points.
